name: High-risk Change
releaseChecks: the exact task, impact surface, rollback, recovery, verification, and post-release observation evidence are complete
Codex independently challenges irreversible, regulated, destructive, value-transfer, and sensitive-data paths
exact user consent is present only for a prepared external, paid, real-user, or irreversible production-data effect

may: derive risk analysis, implementation, verification, rollback, recovery, and challenger plans inside the current governed task scope
execute project-local technical actions after IntentOS gates prove scope, evidence, rollback, and completion readiness
mustNot: delegate architecture, migration, security, dependency, rollback, test, or review strategy choices to the user
perform an external account action, production release, value transfer, real-user communication, regulated-data export, or irreversible production-data effect without exact consent
